Pass.Message: Intelligence is below the recommended level, consider increasing it.
Dexterity is below the recommended level, consider increasing it.
Strength is below the recommended level, consider increasing it.
Wisdom is below the recommended level, consider increasing it.
Charisma is below the recommended level, consider increasing it.
Level exceeds the maximum of 20 — this character is invalid.

Fail.Message: Level is within the valid range (1-20).

Pass.Message: Constitution is dangerously low. Expect very few hit points and high vulnerability to Con-based effects.

Fail.Message: Constitution is within an acceptable range.

Pass.Message: Constitution is below average. A score of at least 10 avoids negative HP modifiers per level.

Fail.Message: Constitution meets the recommended minimum for a positive HP modifier.

Pass.Message: Wisdom is very low. Perception, Insight, and Wisdom saving throws will suffer significantly.

Fail.Message: Wisdom is within an acceptable range.

Pass.Message: Dexterity is very low. Initiative, AC, and Dexterity saving throws will be penalised.

Fail.Message: Dexterity is within an acceptable range.

Pass.Message: Strength is extremely low. Carrying capacity will be severely limited and some armour may be unwearable.

Fail.Message: Strength is within an acceptable range.

Pass.Message: Charisma is extremely low. Social interactions and Charisma saving throws will be very difficult.

Fail.Message: Charisma is within an acceptable range.

Pass.Message: Strength exceeds the standard ability score cap of 20. Verify this is intentional (e.g. Barbarian feature or magic item).

Fail.Message: Strength is within the standard ability score cap.

Pass.Message: Dexterity exceeds the standard ability score cap of 20. Verify this is intentional.

Fail.Message: Dexterity is within the standard ability score cap.

Pass.Message: Constitution exceeds the standard ability score cap of 20. Verify this is intentional.

Fail.Message: Constitution is within the standard ability score cap.
